name: Cable Chest Fly
form_cues: Stand between pulleys, handles at mid-chest height
Slight forward lean and soft elbow bend
Bring hands together in front of sternum; squeeze chest at full ROM
notes: Mid-chest height is the default. Move pulleys higher for low-to-high fly (upper chest) or lower for high-to-low (lower chest).
instructions: Set both pulleys to mid-chest height and attach single-handle attachments. Grip the handles, step forward to create tension, and stagger your stance.
Lean slightly forward, maintain a soft bend in the elbows, and start with arms extended out to the sides at shoulder level.
Squeeze your chest to bring the handles together in front of your sternum in a wide arc. Keep the elbow angle locked throughout — this is a fly, not a press.
Control the eccentric back to the start position with the chest stretched but shoulders stable.
